name: zapcast
description: Viewer-funded peer-to-peer live streaming MVP for Pear.
author: ZapCast contributors

scripts.start:desktop: npm run build:wallet && npm run build:icons && node scripts/start-desktop.mjs
scripts.package: npm run build:wallet && npm run build:icons && electron-forge package
scripts.make: npm run build:wallet && npm run build:icons && electron-forge make
scripts.check: node --check src/main.js && node --check src/app-controller.js && node --check src/nostr/keys.js && node --check src/nostr/event-builder.js && node --check src/nostr/relays.js && node --check src/nostr/parser.js && node --check src/nostr/discovery.js && node --check electron/main.cjs && node --check electron/preload.cjs && node --check electron/server.mjs && node --check forge.config.cjs && node --check ui/runtime.js && node --check ui/app.js && node --check ui/wallet-client.js && node --check ui/nostr-client.js && node --check ui/vendor/wallet-client.js && node --check ui/vendor/nostr-client.js && node --check broadcaster/ingest.js && node --check broadcaster/chunker.js && node --check broadcaster/chunk-watcher.js && node --check p2p/swarm.js && node --check p2p/stream-feed.js && node --check p2p/replication.js && node --check p2p/peer-control.js && node --check payments/wallet.js && node --check reports/report.js && node --check utils/cleanup.js && node --check utils/http-json.js && node --check scripts/start-instance.mjs && node --check scripts/start-desktop.mjs && node --check scripts/build-wallet-client.mjs && node --check scripts/generate-icons.mjs
